message:
fix: Output WASM and .d.ts files to .metal0/bin/ instead of cwd

Root cause: getWasmOutputPath() was outputting to current directory
instead of .metal0/bin/ like other compilation targets.

Also:
- Remove stray generated files from root (runtime.zcs, hello.d.ts)
- Update .gitignore to catch leaked artifacts (*.zcs, *.d.ts)
- Remove unused scripts/ directory

files.patch:
@@ -156,3 +156,8 @@ examples/**/app
 *_backup.*
 *_original.*
 repro_*.zig
+
+# Generated artifacts (should go to .metal0/ but may leak to root)
+*.zcs
+*.d.ts
+*.rmeta
